form.templateUrbanRomanceDesc: Reunion and confession at the café
form.templateTtrpgDesc: Deepwater Tavern party explores the dwarf dungeon

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.deleteTrackConfirm: Delete track "{{name}}" and all its events?
timeline.emptyTrack: No events yet. Double-click canvas or use the button above.
timeline.consistencyClean: Timeline is consistent — no conflicts found
timeline.consistencyConflicts: Found {{count}} consistency conflict(s) (same character on multiple tracks at the same time)
timeline.connectionHint: Click target event to create a {{type}} connection, or
timeline.noMatchingEventsDescription: No events match the current filters. Try clearing filters or changing keywords.
timeline.conflictHint: This event conflicts with others: a linked character appears on multiple tracks at the same time.

empty.title: No characters yet
empty.description: Add your first character with goals and conflicts.

outline.title: Outline
outline.subtitle: Volume → Chapter → Scene → Event
outline.noTracksForEvent: No timeline tracks in this workspace. Please create a track first.

empty.title: Outline is empty
empty.description: Add the first volume to structure your story.

outline.desktopOnlyImage: Image selection is only available on desktop

notebook.title: Notebook
notebook.editorPlaceholder: Write down your ideas and notes… (rich text supported)
notebook.tagPlaceholder: Press Enter to add a tag…

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.subtitle: Insights and consistency
statistics.foreshadowEmpty: No foreshadow connections yet. Select Foreshadow type on the timeline and connect two events.
statistics.empty: No data yet. Start creating and insights will appear here.

map.title: Story Map
map.linkHint: Click a target location to create a path, or
map.noCharacters: No characters yet — create some in the Characters view
map.panHint: Middle/right drag to pan, wheel to zoom

empty.title: The map is empty
empty.description: Add your first location to build the geography of your story world.

vn.emptyScenes: No scenes yet — use the button above to create one
vn.emptyLines: No lines yet — use the buttons above to add dialog, narration, or choices

empty.title: No scenes yet
empty.description: Create your first VN scene with dialog, narration, and branching choices.

novel.title: Novel
novel.editorPlaceholder: Start writing your chapter… (rich text supported)
novel.emptyStateDesc: Select a chapter from the sidebar or create a new chapter to start writing.
novel.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chapter? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No worldbuilding entries
empty.description: Build your story world from history, magic, factions, geography and culture.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro

phaseHint.shortBreak: Take a short break, drink some water
phaseHint.longBreak: Take a good rest and relax

pomodoro.focusComplete: Focus session complete, take a break!

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.placeholder: Type a message and press Enter…
ai.emptyEnabled: Select a session or type a message to start
ai.disabledDescription: Enable AI Assistant and configure API in settings.
ai.ragHint: RAG enabled: AI will reference workspace materials
ai.apiKeyHint: Enter an API Key (Ollama local models may leave this blank)
ai.apiKeyFormatHint: API Key is too short; please check you copied it fully
ai.noModels: No models found. Check Base URL and API Key.
ai.connectionErrorHint: Check Base URL, API Key, and network/proxy settings
ai.promptTimelinePacing: Analyze the event distribution on the current timeline, point out where it is too dense or too sparse, and give adjustment suggestions.
ai.promptTimelineGaps: Check whether there are logical loopholes or time contradictions between events on the current timeline, and list the gaps to fill.
ai.promptNextEvent: Based on the current timeline plot, generate a reasonable follow-up event suggestion for the story.
ai.promptEnrichCharacter: Please enrich the current character with more detailed appearance, personality, motivation, and background, keeping it consistent with existing settings.
ai.promptRelationships: Please analyze possible relationships between the current character and others, and give dramatic suggestions.
ai.promptBackstory: Please write a backstory for the current character that ties into the main plot.
ai.promptOutlineExpand: Please expand the current outline node to make it more concrete and vivid.
ai.promptOutlineArc: Please analyze the current outline from a three-act structure perspective, pointing out climax, turning points, and pacing issues.
ai.promptOutlineScene: Please generate a concrete scene for the current outline node, including character actions, dialogue, and atmosphere.
ai.promptPolishNote: Please polish the current note to make the writing smoother and more literary.
ai.promptContinueNote: Please continue the current note while keeping the same style.
ai.promptSuggestTags: Please extract 3-5 concise tags that summarize the theme of the current note.
ai.promptLocationLore: Please write a piece of local customs, history, or atmosphere for the current location.
ai.promptLocationLinks: Please analyze possible connections between the current location and other locations, characters, or events in the story.
ai.promptFootprints: Please add a character visit plot for the current location based on the timeline and map information.
ai.promptVnLines: Please generate 3-5 lines of dialogue or narration for the current VN scene that match the scene mood.
ai.promptVnScene: Please design the background, camera, and staging suggestions for the current VN scene.
ai.promptVnBranch: Please design 2-3 meaningful player choice branches for the current VN scene.
ai.promptStatsInsight: Please analyze the current statistics and point out potential issues and improvement directions.
ai.promptBalance: Please check whether the story is balanced in terms of character screen time, event density, and completion rate.
ai.promptWorldbuilding: Please add 3-5 creative setting entries for the current worldbuilding category and explain their potential impact on the story.

settings.title: Settings
settings.helpTimelineDesc: The timeline is Plotline's core feature for arranging story events.
settings.helpTimeline1: Click 'Add Track' to create different threads (e.g., main plot, side plot).
settings.helpTimeline2: Double-click on the canvas or click the '+' button to add events.
settings.helpTimeline3: Drag event cards to adjust time or order.
settings.helpTimeline4: Click the connection icon on an event card, then click the target event to establish causal/foreshadowing links.
settings.helpTimeline5: The toolbar can switch between timeline, Gantt chart, tree view, and text mode.
settings.helpOutlineDesc: The outline view is used for planning story structure.
settings.helpOutline1: Create a three-level structure: Volume → Chapter → Scene.
settings.helpOutline2: After selecting a node, click 'Generate Event' to automatically sync to the timeline.
settings.helpPomodoroDesc: The Pomodoro timer helps you stay focused while writing.
settings.helpPomodoro1: Focus for 25 minutes, rest for 5 minutes, and take a long break of 15 minutes after every 4 focus sessions.
settings.helpPomodoro2: Supports warm, minimal, and MC themes.
settings.helpPomodoro3: Sound effects will play after completing a focus session.
settings.accentColorMcHint: Block theme uses a fixed accent color; custom accent will not apply
settings.animationsEnabledDescription: Turn off to keep colors only and stop decorative animations
settings.fontPreview: Font preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. 落霞与孤鹜齐飞，秋水共长天一色。
settings.importFontDesc: Import .ttf / .otf / .woff / .woff2 font files into the app data directory. Desktop only.
settings.checkUpdateDesc: Check online for a newer release. Only available in the desktop app.
settings.updateAvailable: New version v{{version}} available. Install it in-app with one click.
settings.updateInstallPrompt: New version v{{version}} is available. Click below to download and install in-app.
settings.updateInstalling: Downloading and installing the update. The app will close and be replaced automatically.
settings.updatePromptDesc: Plotline v{{version}} is available. Install it in-app now. The app will close and replace the old version automatically.
settings.aiSystemPromptPlaceholder: You are Plotline's AI writing assistant, familiar with narrative writing, character building, outlining and visual novels. Please answer concisely in the user's language.
settings.aiSystemPromptHint: Leave blank to use the default prompt. The system prompt is prepended to every AI conversation.
